charter: Derive and deliver the next tusq.dev increment from VISION.md: build an eval/regression harness for governed CLI workflows so tusq can validate prompt-pack behavior, tool-call expectations, permission/schema regressions, and drift across sample SaaS capability tasks.
acceptance_contract: A documented eval harness or command exists
Golden/sample tasks cover at least one governed workflow
Regression checks validate expected outputs or artifacts
Tests or smoke evidence can run locally
Planning artifacts identify how this advances VISION.md

history.reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval
